testcase.name: User 1 Tests - BaNaNi Zoo › Home page loads successfully
User 1 Tests - BaNaNi Zoo › Navigation to About page works
User 1 Tests - BaNaNi Zoo › Footer contains navigation links
User 2 Tests - BaNaNi Zoo › Add product to cart and open cart drawer
User 2 Tests - BaNaNi Zoo › Favorites page shows authentication message
User 2 Tests - BaNaNi Zoo › Checkout button shows auth warning
User 3 Tests - BaNaNi Zoo › Search functionality returns products
User 3 Tests - BaNaNi Zoo › Compare page loads
User 3 Tests - BaNaNi Zoo › Non-existent route shows error or 404
User 4 Tests - BaNaNi Zoo › Auth popup opens when clicking profile icon
User 4 Tests - BaNaNi Zoo › Footer is present with navigation
User 4 Tests - BaNaNi Zoo › Favorites page shows login prompt
